name: Zhongfu Straits (Pingtan) Development Company Limited
summary: Zhongfu Straits (Pingtan) Development Company Limited provides wood products under the Zhongfu brand in China and internationally. The company offers fir products, wet pine, cold-tolerant eucalyptus, golden lotus, etc.; fiberboards, laminated timber, finger jointed boards, and fine wood board products for use in furniture, household appliances, audio housings, pianos, sports equipment, handicrafts, vehicles, and ships; and financin and pledge financing services for corporate legal persons and individuals. It is also involved in the processing and sale of forest products; cultivation of seedlings; tree planting; and garden landscape design and construction activities. In addition, the company engages in the investment, construction, and operation management of sewage treatment and water plants; and concrete mixing franchise business. The company was formerly known as Fujian Zhongfu Industries Co., Ltd and changed its name to Zhongfu Straits (Pingtan) Development Company Limited in May 2014. Zhongfu Straits (Pingtan) Development Company Limited is based in Fuzhou, China.
